summary: Testing of circle stamp bug fix - Backend generates READABLE horizontal text (not garbled curved text), frontend preview updated to match. Stamp centers on upload. Dragging works smoothly.

issues: Line 742-753: 'Address (appears on outer ring)' label is now misleading since backend uses horizontal text, not curved outer ring text. Low priority - can be removed or relabeled.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test credentials - PASS
GET /api/stamp-templates - Retrieve stamp templates (found circle template) - PASS
POST /api/documents/upload - Upload PDF (3 pages detected) - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp - Generate CIRCLE stamp - PASS (stamp ID: TLS-20260204-*)
POST /api/documents/stamp - Generate centered stamp position (231, 321) - PASS
GET /api/verify/stamp/{id} - Verify generated stamp - PASS (advocate: Test Advocate, status: active)
POST /api/documents/stamp - All shapes (rectangle, circle, oval) generate successfully - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Stamp Document page loads with shape selector (Rectangle, Circle, Oval) - PASS
Circle stamp preview shows HORIZONTAL text (not curved SVG) - PASS (verified: no textPath in HTML)
Stamp positioned at CENTER on document upload - PASS (initial: x=727, y=670)
Dragging stamp works smoothly - PASS (dragged from (727,670) to (827,770))
Generate Verified Stamp completes successfully - PASS (Download option available)
Notarization stamp type works without signature requirement - PASS
PDF loads with page navigation (1/3) - PASS

garbled_curved_text.description: Circle stamp now uses HORIZONTAL text in backend (lines 594-616 in server.py)
garbled_curved_text.frontend_updated: DocumentStampPage.jsx and MyStampsPage.jsx updated to match backend
garbled_curved_text.before: Frontend used SVG textPath for curved text, backend also used curved text but PIL curved text was garbled/unreadable
garbled_curved_text.after: Both frontend and backend now use simple horizontal text with white backgrounds for readability

stamp_centering.description: Stamp defaults to CENTER of page when document is uploaded
stamp_centering.implementation: getStampPosition() calculates center based on page dimensions without previewScale in position

smooth_dragging.description: Dragging stamp is smooth using Rnd component with onDragStop only
smooth_dragging.verified: Successfully dragged stamp 100px in both x and y directions

/app/frontend/src/pages/MyStampsPage.jsx - Updated circle stamp preview to use horizontal text
critical_code_review_comments: Backend circle stamp generation (lines 577-666 in server.py) now uses horizontal text with white backgrounds - matches frontend preview
Frontend circle stamp preview updated in both DocumentStampPage.jsx and MyStampsPage.jsx to use horizontal text instead of SVG curved textPath
Address field in MyStampsPage.jsx (line 742-753) is now unused for circle/oval stamps - could be removed or relabeled
seed_data_creation: Test stamps with TEST_ prefix created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Circle stamp bug is FIXED. Backend generates horizontal text (not curved). Frontend previews updated to match. Stamp centers on upload. Dragging works. Test PDF at /tmp/test_multipage.pdf. All 3 bug items from the original request are verified fixed.
